reference: Hello ma'am, the tightness in the lower abdomen is probably due to the ruptured cyst itself. Also, a pelvic inflammatory condition cannot be ruled out. Anyway, you are getting the computed tomography scan, which should clarify the situation. All the best.
text: Hello, ma'am. The tightness in the lower abdomen is probably due to the ruptured cyst itself. Also, a pelvic inflammatory condition cannot be ruled out. Anyway, you are getting the computed tomography scan, which should clarify the situation. All the best.
